posts.author: thakurvi
posts.text: Jubilant foodworks once market favourite at 800 rupees and now at 421 nobody wants to take it. Intersting how price change perspective and narratives. As far as business is concerned, problems seems to have lower like for like growth, however gross margins have improved due to better product mix, reduced wastage. Management is saying do not look for quarter on quater nuasance. LPG prices and it’s unavailability is also affecting profitability. In my opinion, Swiggy and zomato attack the business moat of Jubilant of free home delivery in 30 mins. Disclaimer: started buying at 423. Technical set…
